query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, u.id, u.name, u.openId, u.role, u.consultorId, u.isActive, u.cpf
FROM users u
WHERE (u.email = 'emanoel.querette@embrapii.org.br' OR u.email = 'leandro.rodrigues@embrapii.org.br')
AND u.isActive = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'consultors', c.id, c.name, '', c.role, NULL, c.isActive, c.cpf
FROM consultors c
WHERE (c.email = 'emanoel.querette@embrapii.org.br' OR c.email = 'leandro.rodrigues@embrapii.org.br')
AND c.isActive = 1
ORDER BY tabela, id DESC;
